name: codex-touchbar-usage
description: Show Codex rate-limit balance on a MacBook Touch Bar through a native macOS helper.

interface.shortDescription: Show Codex usage windows on the MacBook Touch Bar.
interface.longDescription: Codex Touch Bar Usage installs a lightweight native macOS helper that reads Codex rate-limit usage, caches token totals, and renders compact 5-hour and 1-week balance bars on Touch Bar only while Codex is frontmost.
defaultPrompt: Install the Codex Touch Bar usage helper.
Check my Codex usage helper status.
